title: Application Launch and Lifecycle
description: Launching, running, and stopping desktop apps; app init on system start

use_cases.name: Launch App on System Init
use_cases.description: LaunchOnInitService._init() reads gui_params.launch_options.on_initialized and runs each command (e.g., 'window-call') at GUI startup
use_cases.trigger: Service _init() lifecycle hook fires after GUI ready
key_flow: Calls run_(command) -> dispatches to commands['window-call'] -> window[fn_name](...args)

use_cases.name: Launch Desktop App
use_cases.description: User or system calls launch_app(options); creates PortalProcess/PseudoProcess, opens UIWindow with iframe
key_flow: Checks privateAccess; may redirect to fallbackApp
Creates PortalProcess or PseudoProcess with uuid
Opens UIWindow({iframe_url, title, icon, ...}) with app URL + auth params

use_cases.name: Launch App via IPC (App-to-App)
use_cases.description: A running app calls ExecService.launchApp() via IPC to spawn a child app
key_flow: Creates IPC connection (svc_ipc.add_connection) between parent and child
On child IPC_ATTACHED: sends 'childAppLaunched' postMessage to parent
On child window remove: sends 'appClosed' postMessage to parent

use_cases.name: Connect to Existing App Instance
use_cases.description: App calls connectToInstance() via IPC to connect to a running process by name
key_flow: svc_ipc.add_connection({source, target}) creates bidirectional IPC link

use_cases.name: Stop / Close Application
use_cases.description: User closes app window; ProcessService.unregister() removes from process tree, orphaned children reparented to InitProcess
key_flow: Removes from processes_map, processes array, parent's tree list

use_cases.name: Initialize Services at Startup
use_cases.description: ServiceManager orchestrates ordered service startup based on dependencies
key_flow: ServiceManager.register(name, factory, options) called for each service
If deps satisfied -> init_service_(name): sets status=Initializing, calls service_impl.init(), sets status=Running
If deps pending -> tracks in waiting_[dependency] set
On service Running: notifies init_listeners_ and triggers waiting dependents via maybe_init_()
aget(name) / wait_for_init([deps]) provides async dependency-aware service access

use_cases.name: Run INITRC Apps on GUI Ready
use_cases.description: ProcessService handles 'gui:ready' event and auto-launches apps listed in INITRC
key_flow: ProcessService._init(): creates root InitProcess(uuid=NULL_UUID), calls register_(root)
__on_gui:ready() event fires after GUI is ready
Iterates ProcessService.INITRC list (currently empty by default)

key_classes.name: LaunchOnInitService
key_classes.notes: Reads gui_params.launch_options.on_initialized; dispatches window-call commands at startup

key_classes.name: ServiceManager
key_classes.notes: Dependency-aware service lifecycle; services wait for deps before init

key_classes.name: ProcessService
key_classes.notes: Manages process tree; root is InitProcess with NULL_UUID; orphaned children reparented to init

key_classes.name: ExecService
key_classes.notes: Exposed to apps via IPC; wraps launch_app helper; manages parent-child IPC connections

key_classes.name: Process
key_classes.notes: Base class; ipc_status starts as PROCESS_IPC_PENDING

key_classes.name: PortalProcess
key_classes.notes: Represents a real app running in an iframe; has references.iframe and references.el_win

key_classes.name: PseudoProcess
key_classes.notes: Represents built-in virtual apps like 'explorer' and 'trash' (no iframe)

key_relationships: LaunchOnInitService extends Service; uses gui_params at startup
ProcessService extends Service; owns process tree rooted at InitProcess
ProcessService depends_on ExecService (calls svc_exec.launchApp for INITRC)
ExecService extends Service; calls launch_app() helper; depends_on IPCService
launch_app() creates PortalProcess or PseudoProcess and calls ProcessService.register()
ServiceManager orchestrates all service lifecycles with dependency graph
InitProcess is the root parent for all processes (NULL_UUID parent)
On app close: ProcessService.unregister() reparents children to InitProcess
important_notes: ProcessService.INITRC is empty by default (commented out 'puter-linux')
LaunchOnInitService supports only 'window-call' command type at init
launch_app handles private access control with fallback app redirect (max depth 1)
GODMODE apps get super auth_token directly in iframe URL instead of per-app token
ExecService.connectToInstance is currently hardcoded: only 'phoenix' can connect to 'puter-linux'
ServiceManager.get() returns undefined (not error) if service is not yet Running
ServiceManager.aget() blocks until service reaches Running state
